findings.title: Upward layer import: enriched.py → auth.py
findings.description: src/myapp/models/enriched.py:3 — data/infrastructure layer imports from presentation/API layer. Expected direction: presentation → service → data.
findings.fix: Move auth.py logic behind a service layer or abstraction interface that enriched.py is allowed to import.

findings.title: Upward layer import: enriched.py → orders.py
findings.description: src/myapp/models/enriched.py:4 — data/infrastructure layer imports from presentation/API layer. Expected direction: presentation → service → data.
findings.fix: Move orders.py logic behind a service layer or abstraction interface that enriched.py is allowed to import.
